case_title: BRADLEY TOROK et al VS. KIM MCDONALD et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOROK, BRADLEY TOROK, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONALD, KIM FOLLMER, PHILLIP DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-07-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-04-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-23-2003

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS AND TO RECOVER ATTORNEYS FEES. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- DEFENDANTS' PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION GRANTED, AND STAY PROCEEDINGS GRANTED. REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF'S ORAL REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION WAS DENIED. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

Off Calendar Sep-16-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Opposition papers were filed late. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF BRADLEY TOROK AND KELLY TOROK'S MOTION For Order Of Contempt Of Court Pursuant To CCP 1212: DENIED. Prevailing party to submit proposed order. MINI MINUTES:

Brian E. Soriano, Esq. of GOLDSTEIN, GELLMAN 621-5600, for Defendants Kim McDonald and Phillip Follmer, moving to compel arbitration and stay proceedings and to recover attorneys fees
Peter L. Balogh, Esq., 650/355-8834, for plaintiffs and opposing party
